allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=data.get\('deployments', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data; [print\(d.get\('url',''\), d.get\('state',''\), d.get\('created',''\)\) for d in deps[:3]]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) deps = data.get\('deployments', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data for d in deps[:3]: print\(d.get\('url',''\), d.get\('state',''\), d.get\('created',''\), d.get\('meta',{}\).get\('githubCommitSha',''\)[:8]\) except: print\('parse error'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\)]")
